name: indico-plugin-payment-sixpay

metadata.name: indico-plugin-payment-sixpay
metadata.summary: SIXPay/Saferpay payments for Indico event registration fees

documentation:
# SIXPay-Saferpay Payment Plugin

This plugin provides a payment option for Indico's payment module using the
SIXPay Saferpay API.

When used, the user will be sent to Saferpay to make the payment, and afterwards
they are automatically sent back to Indico.

## Changelog

### 3.3.2

- Update translations

### 3.3.1

- Update iso4217 dependency
- Support longer Saferpay account IDs

### 3.3

- Support (and require) Python 3.12

### 3.2.1

- Support Python 3.11

### 3.2

- Update translations

### 3.1.2

- Fix error after successful payment if background confirmation already happened

### 3.1.1

- Ignore pending transactions once they expired

### 3.1

- Adapt to Indico 3.1 changes

### 3.0

- Initial release for Indico 3.0

## Credits

Originally developed by Max Fischer for Indico 1.2 and 2.x. Updated to use the
latest SIXPay API by Martin Claus. Adapted to Indico 3.0 and Python 3 by the
CERN Indico Team.

functions.name: indico_payment_sixpay.util.validate_currency
documentation:
Check whether the currency can be properly handled by this plugin.

```
param iso_code

an ISO4217 currency code, e.g. "EUR"

raises

 if the currency is not valid
```

functions.name: indico_payment_sixpay.util.to_small_currency
documentation:
Convert an amount from large currency to small currency.

```
param large_currency_amount

the amount in large currency, e.g. 2.3

param iso_code

the ISO currency code, e.g. "EUR"

return

the amount in small currency, e.g. 230
```

functions.name: indico_payment_sixpay.util.to_large_currency
documentation: Inverse of {py:func}`to_small_currency`.

functions.name: indico_payment_sixpay.util.get_customer_id
documentation:
Extract customer ID from account ID.

Customer ID is the first part (befor the hyphen) of the account ID.

functions.name: indico_payment_sixpay.util.get_terminal_id
documentation:
Extract the teminal ID from account ID.

The Terminal ID is the second part (after the hyphen) of the
account ID.

classes.name: indico_payment_sixpay.forms.FormatField

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.forms.FormatField.__init__
documentation:
Format field validator, i.e. strings with `{key}` placeholders.

```
param max_length

optional maximum length,
checked on a test formatting

param field_map

keyword arguments to use for test formatting

param id_safe

only allow fields safe for a saferpay id argument
```

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.forms.FormatField.__call__
documentation:
Validate format field data.

Returns true on successful validation, else an ValidationError is
thrown.

Validator for format fields, i.e. strings with `{key}` placeholders.

```
param max_length

optional maximum length, checked on a test formatting

param field_map

keyword arguments to use for test formatting
```

On validation, a test mapping is applied to the field. This ensures the
field has a valid `str.format` format, and does not use illegal keys
(as determined by `default_field_map` and `field_map`).
The `max_length` is validated against the test-formatted field, which
is an estimate for an average sized input.
XXX: Maybe this could be refactored to use the standard indico Placeholder system?

classes.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.TransactionFailure
documentation:
A transaction with SIXPay failed.

```
param step

name of the step at which the transaction failed

param details

verbose description of what went wrong
```

classes.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.RHSixpayBase
documentation:
Request Handler for asynchronous callbacks from SIXPay.

These handlers are used either by

- the user, when he is redirected from SIXPay back to Indico
- SIXPay, when it sends back the result of a transaction

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.RHInitSixpayPayment._get_transaction_parameters
documentation: Get parameters for creating a transaction request.

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.RHInitSixpayPayment._init_payment_page
documentation: Initialize payment page.

classes.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler._process
documentation: Process the reply from SIXPay about the transaction.

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler._process_confirmation
documentation: Process the confirmation response inside indico.

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler._perform_request
documentation:
Perform a request against SIXPay.

```
param task

description of the request, used for error handling

param endpoint

the URL endpoint relative to the SIXPay base URL

param **data

source:5: (WARNING/2) Inline strong start-string without end-string.

data passed during the request
```

This will automatically raise any HTTP errors encountered during the
request. If the request itself fails, a {py:exc}`~.TransactionFailure`
is raised for `task`.

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler._assert_payment
documentation:
Check the status of the transaction with SIXPay.

Returns transaction assert data.

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler._is_duplicate_transaction
documentation: Check if this transaction has already been recorded.

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler._is_authorized
documentation: Check if payment is authorized.

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler._is_captured
documentation: Check if payment is captured, i.e. the cash flow is triggered.

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler._verify_amount
documentation:
Verify the amount and currency of the payment.

Sends an email but still registers incorrect payments.

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler._capture_transaction
documentation:
Confirm to SIXPay that the transaction is accepted.

On success returns the response JSON data.

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler._cancel_transaction
documentation:
Inform Sixpay that the transaction is canceled.

Cancel the transaction at Sixpay. This method is implemented but
not used and tested yet.

methods.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.SixpayNotificationHandler._register_payment
documentation: Register the transaction as paid.
Handler for notification from SIXPay service.

documentation: User redirect target in case of cancelled payment.

classes.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.UserFailureHandler
documentation: User redirect target in case of failed payment.

classes.name: indico_payment_sixpay.controllers.UserSuccessHandler
documentation: User redirect target in case of successful payment.
